completeSwap(address,bytes32).details: The `sender` parameter is required by the callback pattern but is unused here.

params.swap_id: The swap ID to deposit for.

params.chain_id2: Chain ID of the swap closer chain.
params.timeout: Duration in seconds before the swap expires (1 hour – 7 days).
params.token1: Token to sell on this chain.
params.token2: Token expected in return on the destination chain.

acknowledgeSwap(bytes32).notice: User2 acknowledges participation in a swap on the closer chain.

cancelSwap(bytes32,string).notice: Cancels a swap and refunds deposited tokens.         Can be called by either participant or by the RSC after timeout.

completeSwap(address,bytes32).notice: Completes the swap by distributing tokens to the counterparty.         Called by the RSC on both chains once both deposits are confirmed.

createSwapInfo(address,bytes32,address,a.notice: Creates a full copy of swap info on the closer chain.         Called by the RSC after it detects a SwapInitiated event on the origin chain.

depositTokens(bytes32).notice: Deposit tokens into the swap contract. User1 deposits on chain 1 after acknowledgment;         User2 deposits on chain 2 after User1 has deposited.

initiateSwap(address,uint256,address,uin.notice: Initiates a new cross-chain atomic swap.

updateSwapInfo(address,bytes32,uint8,add.notice: Synchronises swap state from a cross-chain event.         Called by the RSC to mirror state changes on the counterpart chain.
